text: The Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) is a multidisciplinary and comparative longitudinal project which was designed to explore the challenges with a rapidly ageing population in Europe. Via an inquiry of how Europeans manage the changes of later life, the project investigates and sheds light on numerous key aspects related to the economic, social and health aspects of ageing and their interrelations. This handbook contains first of all based on SHARE a series of analyses which shed light to the processes of ageing within European societies, and thus can serve as an important basis for the development of successful policies guaranteeing high levels of social, economic and health security in the ageing societies.
